name: Leydroth Spellbreaker
description:
The larynx of a leydroth, a dangerous creature whose roar can unravel magic, is integrated into the firing mechanism of this +3 greater striking blunderbuss.

Activate—Dispelling Blast 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect The leydroth spellbreaker emits a of dispelling energy. Attempt a single counteract check at [[/r 1d20+25 #Counteract]]{+25} against each spell or magical effect in the area, plus one item or effect on each creature in the area, with the effects of .

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include the larynx of a leydroth.
